# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

interface ModuleConfig {
  path: string;
  name: string;
}

interface Plugin {
  name: string;
  execute: (request: Request, context?: any) => Promise<Response> | Response;
  init?: () => Promise<void> | void;
}

const loadedPlugins = new Map<string, Plugin>();

async function loadModule(modulePath: string, moduleName: string): Promise<Plugin | null> {
  try {
    const module = await import(modulePath);
    const plugin: Plugin = {
      name: moduleName,
      execute: module.default || module.execute,
      init: module.init
    };

    if (plugin.init) {
      await plugin.init();
    }

    loadedPlugins.set(moduleName, plugin);
    return plugin;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Failed to load module ${modulePath}:`, error);
    return null;
  }
}

function parseModuleConfig(configString: string): ModuleConfig[] {
  try {
    const configs: ModuleConfig[] = [];
    const entries = configString.split(",");
    
    for (const entry of entries) {
      const [name, path] = entry.trim().split(":");
      if (name && path) {
        configs.push({ name: name.trim(), path: path.trim() });
      }
    }
    
    return configs;
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

async function initializePluginsFromEnv() {
  const moduleConfig = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES");
  
  if (moduleConfig) {
    const configs = parseModuleConfig(moduleConfig);
    
    for (const config of configs) {
      await loadModule(config.path, config.name);
    }
  }
}

async function handleRequest(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const path = url.pathname;

  if (path === "/") {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({
      message: "Plugin System API",
      endpoints: {
        "/": "API info",
        "/plugins": "List loaded plugins",
        "/load": "Load a plugin (query params: name, path)",
        "/execute/:pluginName": "Execute a plugin"
      }
    }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
    });
  }

  if (path === "/plugins") {
    const plugins = Array.from(loadedPlugins.keys());
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({
      plugins,
      count: plugins.length
    }), {
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
    });
  }

  if (path === "/load") {
    const modulePath = url.searchParams.get("path");
    const moduleName = url.searchParams.get("name");

    if (!modulePath || !moduleName) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({
        error: "Missing required parameters: name and path"
      }), {
        status: 400,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }

    const plugin = await loadModule(modulePath, moduleName);

    if (plugin) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({
        success: true,
        message: `Plugin ${moduleName} loaded successfully`
      }), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    } else {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({
        error: `Failed to load plugin ${moduleName}`
      }), {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }
  }

  if (path.startsWith("/execute/")) {
    const pluginName = path.substring("/execute/".length);
    const plugin = loadedPlugins.get(pluginName);

    if (!plugin) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({
        error: `Plugin ${pluginName} not found`
      }), {
        status: 404,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }

    try {
      const context = {
        env: Deno.env.toObject(),
        url: url.toString()
      };
      
      return await plugin.execute(request, context);
    } catch (error) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({
        error: `Plugin execution failed: ${error.message}`
      }), {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }
  }

  if (path === "/reload") {
    const moduleName = url.searchParams.get("name");
    
    if (!moduleName) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({
        error: "Missing required parameter: name"
      }), {
        status: 400,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }

    const moduleConfig = Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES");
    if (moduleConfig) {
      const configs = parseModuleConfig(moduleConfig);
      const config = configs.find(c => c.name === moduleName);
      
      if (config) {
        loadedPlugins.delete(moduleName);
        const plugin = await loadModule(config.path, config.name);
        
        if (plugin) {
          return new Response(JSON.stringify({
            success: true,
            message: `Plugin ${moduleName} reloaded successfully`
          }), {
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
          });
        }
      }
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({
      error: `Plugin ${moduleName} configuration not found`
    }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
    });
  }

  if (path === "/unload") {
    const moduleName = url.searchParams.get("name");
    
    if (!moduleName) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({
        error: "Missing required parameter: name"
      }), {
        status: 400,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }

    if (loadedPlugins.has(moduleName)) {
      loadedPlugins.delete(moduleName);
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({
        success: true,
        message: `Plugin ${moduleName} unloaded successfully`
      }), {
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
      });
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({
      error: `Plugin ${moduleName} not found`
    }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
    });
  }

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({
    error: "Not found"
  }), {
    status: 404,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
  });
}

await initializePluginsFromEnv();

serve(handleRequest);
